name: Cloudinary
description: Cloudinary is a cloud-based media management platform. It provides APIs for uploading, transforming, optimizing, and delivering images and videos at scale, plus an Admin API for managing your media library programmatically.

capabilities.name: upload_asset
capabilities.description: Upload an image or video to Cloudinary from a URL, file, or base64 string. Supports eager transformations applied on upload.

capabilities.name: list_resources
capabilities.description: List assets in your Cloudinary account. Filter by resource type, folder, tags, or moderation status with pagination.

capabilities.name: get_resource_details
capabilities.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific asset by its public ID, including dimensions, format, colors, and transformation history.

capabilities.name: delete_resource
capabilities.description: Delete one or more assets from your Cloudinary account by public ID. Supports bulk deletion.

capabilities.name: create_folder
capabilities.description: Create a new folder in your Cloudinary media library to organize assets hierarchically.

capabilities.name: generate_transform_url
capabilities.description: Generate a Cloudinary delivery URL with transformations applied (resize, crop, format, quality, effects).

capabilities.name: create_upload_preset
capabilities.description: Create a reusable upload preset with predefined transformations, folder destinations, and access settings.
